Klasse AAppc.ErrorReport

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.apps.AAppc.ErrorReport
Umschließende Klasse:
AAppc
public class AAppc.ErrorReport extends Object
An error report containing an error counter and a list of error messages.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff, BTU Cottbus-Senftenberg
